name: springmaster_zbm_core_source_copy_acceptance
description: Prepare and document the first controlled Core source-copy acceptance for the generated ZBM backend, including scope-compatible generated Core update documents and target-local Core dependency synthesis.
changes: Writes generated Core update review documents to PROJECT_DOCS/CORE/PLATFORM_UPDATES so core-scope patches are target-patch compatible
Synthesizes target-local pom.xml Core compile dependencies for core and core-runtime generated patches instead of copying the Springmaster master pom.xml
Uses minimal API dependencies for persistence, validation and Spring Data page support without enabling datasource auto-configuration
Documents ZBM Core source-copy acceptance as the required bridge before fachlicher service-slice generation
Advances Platform version to 0.13.42 and Platform-Update version to 0.8.2
